Open Source Projects

Here you can find a list of my open source libraries used in peer-reviewed publications. Click on the project names for more information..

newdust

A modular Python library for dust scattering computations, with high energy capabilities

gastronomy

A simple helper library for managing abundances, chemical formulae, and summing cross-sections

pyXsis

The Pythonic X-ray Spectral Interpretation System

A simple X-ray spectroscopy analysis framework built on Spectrum1D class from specutils (no need to install XSPEC)
